subject: [PATCH v2 04/13] sunrpc: rename cache_pipe_upcall() to cache_do_upcall()

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch renames the function cache_pipe_upcall() to cache_do_upcall() in anticipation of a future netlink-based upcall mechanism. The renaming is done to make the code more flexible and prepare it for upcoming changes. This change does not introduce any new functionality but rather sets the stage for future improvements.
